_comment: Claude Code does NOT expand ${VAR} inside this file — the env block is
passed verbatim to the child process. We therefore launch each server
through `sh -c` so the real shell performs substitution against the
parent environment. Ensure NEO4J_URI / NEO4J_USER / NEO4J_PASSWORD /
OPENAI_API_KEY are exported in your shell before launching Claude Code
(see .env.example for the list). NAM_* vars configure the bundled
